subject: Thanks for your application — Staff Platform Engineer at Acme
body:
Hi,

Thanks for applying to the Staff Platform Engineer role at Acme. We've received your application and our team will review it shortly. If your background is a fit, a recruiter will reach out within 7-10 days.

Best,
Acme Talent Team

This email was sent by Greenhouse on behalf of Acme. Reply directly with any questions.
